descriptionEn: Name possibly means "sprout." He is the son of Arphaxad and one of the postdiluvian ancestors of Abraham. Sometimes spelled Shelah or Sala.

verses.line: And Arphaxad begat Salah; and Salah begat Eber.

images.caption: Salah son of Arphaxad. Published: Guillaume Rouille, Source:  "Promptuarii Iconum Insigniorum ", c. 1553
